They can log into your Gmail. Um, they can send emails, do research, they can do almost anything you do but faster whilst you're sleeping. That is Plexi's computer agent. And now it controls a real browser called Comet, right? Which means that it's not pretending to browse the web. It can actually browse the web for you directly. And if you're wondering, okay, what is Comet browser? Comet is a browser, right? So it's just like Chrome or Safari, but it was built specifically to work with AI. So when you run Perplexi's computer agent inside Comet, this agent takes over your browser like a real human would. So I can click links, fill forms, log into apps you're already signed into, navigate websites, read pages, implement stuff. And the key thing here and this huge is like it runs on your device, right? It's running locally via your browser. So this is fully local. So for example, if we say in my local comet browser, search the latest AI news in a new tab. It says looking for the latest AI news. Now, at this point, I want to talk to you about something called the browser control framework. And here's the framework to understand how to think about perplexity computer with comet directly, right? How to use this properly and how to get the most of it. It has four layers. So number one is the agent, the brain. This is perplexity computer agent. It can think, plan and decide what to do. You give it a go and it figures out. Now layer number two is the browser, right? And this is comet. And the agent uses the browser the same way you would use your hands, right? It can click, scroll, type, read and navigate. Layer number three is the login, right? So it's running locally on machine. So it's using your existing sessions. So for example, it could post directly to school for me. And layer number four is the task, right? And this is what you tell it to do. So research competitors, monitor your inbox, build a dashboard, spot trends, post to school, uh post a daily news update, right? Framework is simple. You give it a mission and the rest handles itself. Now I've actually got a full 30-day plan for implementing this with day-by-day prompts as you can see. So you can take these prompts and just learn how to master Plexi computer with this browser agent. But this is by far the most impressive AI agent I've ever used with a browser.
